source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5
distilled_thesis: Across the blessing and its aftermath, Zarathustra receives solar excess into himself, turning outer abundance into an inwardly held charge.
